characters.facial_features: bald head, thick mustache, irritated scowl, holding cue card
characters.clothing: light-colored suit with tie, standing behind podium on left side

characters.facial_features: swept-back gray hair, thick-rimmed glasses, sly grin, finger beside chin
characters.clothing: dark jacket, standing behind podium on right side

prompt: A TV production control room with two men at podiums. On the left, a bald mustached man in a light suit looking irritated and holding a cue card. On the right, a tall man with glasses in a dark jacket with finger beside chin. Background shows a bank of TV monitors showing static and video feeds, a mixing board with switches and faders, dim blue glow from screens, technical equipment and cables. Dark, moody atmosphere. Ink sketch on aged parchment paper, hand-drawn illustration style with visible line work and paper texture. Heavier ink weight and darker shadows than typical. No text, no words, no letters anywhere in the image.
negative_prompt: text, words, letters, numbers, captions, subtitles, watermarks, signatures, blurry, deformed hands, photorealistic, 3D render, CGI, digital art look, clean vector style
style: Hand-drawn ink sketch on aged parchment paper, editorial illustration style, visible pen strokes, cross-hatching for shadows, warm paper tone background, heavier line weight for darker mood
composition: 16:9 wide shot, two men at podiums flanking center, control room equipment visible in background, darker overall tone
lighting: dim blue glow from monitors, darker mood, shadows prominent
color_palette: primarily black ink on warm cream/beige parchment, heavier ink coverage for darker atmosphere, subtle blue tint from monitor glow
